name: Sprite Animation
description: Play, stop, or pause AnimatedSprite2D animations.

name: Tween Animation
description: Tween a 2D node property such as position, rotation, scale, or modulate.

name: Camera Zoom
description: Changes Camera2D zoom. 1.0 = normal, 2.0 = zoomed in, 0.5 = zoomed out.

name: Set Camera
description: Makes the named Camera2D the active camera. Use a one-shot sensor when possible so make_current() is not called every frame.

name: Smooth Follow Camera
description: Smoothly follows this Node2D with the named Camera2D while maintaining the camera's initial offset from the target.

name: Object Flash
description: Flash a 2D object with a temporary color overlay.

name: Character Jump 2D
description: Character Jump 2D logic brick.

name: Force 2D
description: Force 2D logic brick.

name: Impulse 2D
description: Impulse 2D logic brick.

name: Linear Velocity 2D
description: Linear Velocity 2D logic brick.

name: Character 2D Physics
description: Finalizes CharacterBody2D movement once per physics frame. Motion 2D bricks add requested movement; this brick applies gravity, friction, acceleration, snapping, slope limits, bounce, and move_and_slide().

name: Motion 2D
description: For CharacterBody2D movement, this only requests/accumulates velocity for the frame. Character 2D Physics should be used once on the character to apply friction, gravity, diagonal normalization, and move_and_slide().

name: Mouse
description: Mouse logic brick.
props: Cursor Visibility,Mouse Look,Look Towards,Move Towards Cursor,Move To Mouse Click

name: Teleport 2D
description: Instantly sets position to a target Node2D or coordinates.\nUseful for respawning, portals, checkpoints, and spawn points.

name: 3D Audio
description: Play, stop, pause, and fade 3D or spatial audio from a file.

name: 3rd Person Camera
description: Orbits a Camera3D around the character via a pivot Node3D.\nAssign both the pivot and the camera in the Inspector.\nThe camera can live anywhere in the scene — including inside a SubViewport for split screen.

name: Animation State
description: Beginner-friendly AnimationTree control. Use Go To State for normal character animations. Blending comes from the transition Xfade Time inside the AnimationTree.
props: Go To State:go_to_state,Set Blend Parameter:set_parameter,Advanced - Set Condition:set_condition_value

name: Camera Zoom
description: Changes camera FOV (3D) or zoom (2D).\nDrag your camera into the inspector slot.

name: Character Physics
description: Character Actuator - Unified character controller for CharacterBody3D Handles gravity, ground detection, and move_and_slide() in one brick. Jumping is handled by the separate Jump Actuator. Pair with an Always Sensor so it runs every frame. Horizontal movement is handled by separate Motion / Move Towards Actuators. Execution order (guaranteed): 1. Pre-process: reset horizontal velocity 2. This chain: apply gravity, detect ground 3. Other chains: motion actuators set velocity.x / velocity.z; Jump Actuator sets velocity.y 4. Post-process: move_and_slide()

name: Collision
description: Can enable/disable CollisionShape3D nodes, set collision layer/mask bits, and toggle Area3D monitoring. Target node is found by name via find_child().
props: Disable Shape,Enable Shape,Set Layer Bit,Set Mask Bit,Enable Monitoring,Disable Monitoring

name: Edit Object
description: Similar to UPBGE's Edit Object actuator.

name: Environment
description: Modifies WorldEnvironment properties at runtime.\nDrag your WorldEnvironment node into the inspector slot.\nAll value fields accept a number or a variable name / expression.

name: Force
description: NOTE: Only works with RigidBody3D, not CharacterBody3D

name: Gravity
description: Use this with RigidBody3D objects. CharacterBody3D gravity belongs in the Character Actuator. This actuator writes to RigidBody3D.constant_force instead of using apply_central_force(). That makes gravity keep working after a one-shot trigger such as a Delay sensor.

name: Impulse
description: Applies a one-shot impulse to a RigidBody3D.\nFires once per activation — does not accumulate each frame.

name: Light
description: Control a light node's properties and apply animated FX effects.\nSelect the light type to expose its specific properties.

name: Linear Velocity
description: Similar to UPBGE's Linear Velocity actuator

name: Look At Input
description: Rotates a Node3D to face the combined Input Map direction instead of the movement/slide direction. Type the node name; the generated script finds it in the current scene at runtime.

name: Look At Movement
description: Rotates a Node3D to face the direction of movement. Type the node name; the generated script finds it in the current scene at runtime.

name: Motion
description: Moves or rotates a target node. Leave Target Node Name blank to affect self. X/Y/Z fields accept numbers, variable names, or math expressions.

name: Mouse
description: Toggle cursor visibility or rotate object based on mouse movement
props: Cursor Visibility,Mouse Look,Look Towards,Move Towards Cursor,Move To Mouse Click

name: Move Towards
description:
Moves toward or away from a target.
Seek: move directly toward target
Flee: move away from target
Path Follow: use NavigationAgent3D to pathfind toward target.

⚠ Path Follow finds the NavigationAgent3D by typed node name.

name: Object Flash
description: Flashes a mesh/object with a temporary color overlay.\nType a node name, not a path.\n\

name: Object Pool
description: Spawns objects from reusable pools.\nFaster than instancing — reuses inactive nodes.\nPools are created at startup.

name: Object Shake
description: Shakes a named object by rotation, translation, or scale, then returns it to its starting value.\nType a node name, not a path. Use multiple Object Shake actuators for multiple effects.

name: Parent
description: Similar to UPBGE's Parent actuator

name: Physics
description: Suspend/Resume physics, change mass, gravity, damping, etc.
props: Suspend Physics,Resume Physics,Set Mass,Set Gravity Scale,Set Linear Damping,Set Angular Damping,Enable Contact Monitor,Disable Contact Monitor

name: Progress Bar
description: Sets the value, min, or max of a ProgressBar, HSlider, VSlider, or any Range node found by name anywhere in the current scene tree.

name: Rotate Towards
description: Rotates this node to face a target found by name or group.\nUseful for turrets, enemies tracking a player, or any look-at behaviour.

name: Save / Load
description: Three scopes: This Node   — saves position, rotation, and variables for the node this brick is on Target Node — saves position, rotation, and variables for a specific named node Group       — saves position, rotation, and variables for every node in a named group No custom save()/load() methods required on any node. Pair with an InputMap Sensor or Collision Sensor to trigger

name: Screen Shake
description: Trauma-based camera shake.\nType the Camera3D node name. The generated script searches the whole current scene tree, so this brick can live on any 3D node.

name: Set Camera
description:
Makes the assigned Camera3D the active camera.
Use a one-shot sensor (e.g. Delay or a state transition) to avoid
calling make_current() every frame unnecessarily.

⚠ Adds an @export in the Inspector — assign your Camera3D there.

name: Smooth Follow Camera
description:
Smoothly follows this node with the assigned Camera3D,
maintaining the camera's initial offset from the target.

Position follow: camera tracks the node's position per axis.
Rotation follow: camera orbits the node, keeping it in frame.
Dead zone: camera only moves once the node exceeds the threshold.

⚠ Adds an @export in the Inspector — assign your Camera3D there.

name: Split Screen
description:
Creates a split screen layout.
Apply Code always builds all 4 SubViewportContainers.
Each player count has its own independent layout.
Change split_screen_players at runtime to switch counts
without re-applying code.
** Use an Always sensor so the layout updates every frame.

name: Sprite Frames
description: Play, stop, or pause Sprite3D / AnimatedSprite3D frame animations.\nFinds the target by name anywhere in the scene tree.\nLeave Target Node empty to use the node this script is on.

name: Teleport
description:
Instantly sets position to a target node or coordinates.
Useful for respawning, portals, checkpoints.

⚠ Target Node mode adds an @export in the Inspector — assign the destination node there.

name: Text
description: Updates a Label, Label3D, or RichTextLabel by node name. Searches the whole current scene tree, so this brick can live on any node.

name: Torque
description: Applies torque (rotational force) to RigidBody3D objects

name: Waypoint Path
description: Moves this node through a series of waypoints or along an editable Path3D curve.

name: Character Jump
description: Applies a jump impulse to a CharacterBody3D. Pair with the Character Actuator for gravity and ground detection.

name: 2D Audio
description: Play 2D or UI audio from a file.

name: Animation
description: Play, stop, or control animations by name.\nAutomatically finds the AnimationPlayer that owns the animation.\nWorks with AnimationPlayers nested at any depth.

name: Game
description: Exit, restart, pause, and screenshot functionality

name: Hit Stop
description: Briefly pauses or slows game time when an impact lands.\nUse for attacks, damage, blocks, heavy landings, and breaks.\nThis is also called hit pause or impact freeze.

name: Modify Variable
description: Modifies a variable's value.\nWorks with local and global variables.\nAutomatically uses GlobalVars if not found locally.

name: Modulate
description: Sets or smoothly transitions the color/alpha of a UI or 2D node found by name anywhere in the current scene tree.

name: Music
description:
Three modes:
Tracks: define and create music players at startup.
Set: set which track is current (and optionally play it).
Control: play, stop, pause, resume, or crossfade from current to another track.

name: Preload
description: Preloads resources (materials, scenes, textures, audio, meshes) into memory before they are needed, preventing runtime hitches and frame drops.

name: Property
description:
Sets properties on a target node.
Choose the node type to see its available properties.
Leave a field empty to skip setting that property.
⚠ Adds @export in Inspector — assign the target node.

name: Random
description: Similar to UPBGE's Random actuator
props: Bool Constant,Bool Uniform,Bool Bernoulli,Int Constant,Int Uniform,Int Poisson,Float Constant,Float Uniform,Float Normal,Float Neg Exp

name: Rumble
description:
Trigger controller haptic vibration.
Vibrate: manual motor control for a set duration.
Stop: immediately stop all vibration.
Pattern: built-in presets that play to completion.
The sensor only needs to fire once — the pattern finishes even if the sensor stops.

name: Scene
description: Similar to UPBGE's Scene actuator

name: Screen Flash
description: Flashes a color over the screen.\nPress \

name: Signal
description: Sends a signal to other nodes.\nReceiving nodes need a Signal Sensor listening for the subject.

name: State
description: State logic brick.

name: Tween
description: Animates any property on self or on a node found by name anywhere in the current scene tree.

name: Visibility
description: Shows, hides, or toggles visibility of a node by name. Uses the same current-scene recursive name lookup as the Text Actuator.

name: Get Variable
description: Reads a variable from self, another node, or GlobalVars and stores it for later bricks.

name: Get Transforms
description: Gets position, rotation, and scale from a node or the nearest member of a group and stores the values as variables.

name: Set Transforms
description: Sets position, rotation, and scale from entered values or variables, instantly or over time.

name: 2D Audio
description: Plays UI or 2D audio.

name: Button
description: Triggers, toggles, presses, or releases a Button node.

name: Focus
description: Grabs or releases keyboard/gamepad focus on a Control node.

name: Modulate
description: Sets or transitions color/alpha on a Control or CanvasItem node.

name: Popup
description: Shows, hides, toggles, or centers a Popup/Window-like UI node.

name: Progress Bar
description: Sets the value, min, or max of a ProgressBar, Slider, or Range UI node.

name: Screen Flash
description: Flashes a full-screen ColorRect overlay.

name: Scroll
description: Sets or adds to a ScrollContainer scroll position.

name: Slider
description: Sets or adds to a Slider or Range value.

name: Tab
description: Changes the active tab on a TabContainer.

name: Text
description: Updates a Label, RichTextLabel, or other text UI node.

name: Tween
description: Tweens a UI node property.

name: Visibility
description: Shows, hides, or toggles a UI node.

name: Window
description: Shows, hides, toggles, or centers a Window node.

name: Controller
description: AND: all connected sensors must be active OR: any connected sensor must be active NAND: NOT all sensors active (fires unless all are true) NOR: NO sensors active (fires only when all are false) XOR: exactly one sensor is active

name: Script Controller
description: Works like UPBGE's Python Controller (module mode): - Point to a .gd file - That file defines a top-level function: func run(node: Node) -> void: - When the sensor fires, run(node) is called — node is the scene object Example script (my_script.gd): func run(node: Node) -> void: node.health -= 10 print("Health: ", node.health) The script does NOT need extends — it is called as a module, not instantiated.

name: Collision 2D
description: Detects collisions via an Area2D node located by name.\n\nType the node name (not the full path) into 'Area Node Name'.

name: Movement 2D
description: Detects if a 2D node is moving in specific directions.\nCheck which directions to monitor.\nActive when any checked direction moves past the threshold.

name: Physics 2D
description: Checks CharacterBody2D collision state: on floor, on wall, or on ceiling.\nUse this for jump checks, wall checks, ceiling bumps, and platformer logic.

name: Proximity 2D
description: Detects objects within a distance and optional angle.\nUses groups to filter which objects are detected.

name: Raycast 2D
description: Detects along a RayCast2D. This can be used for objects, groups, walls, ground, or ledges.\nThe RayCast2D's direction, length, and collision mask are set on the RayCast2D node itself.

name: Actuator
description: Fires TRUE when the named actuator on this node matches the chosen state.\nThe actuator must have an instance name set.

name: Animation Tree
description: The AnimationTree is found by typed node name Modes: Current State: True when the state machine is in a specific state Condition: True when a boolean condition matches Parameter Compare: True when a parameter meets a comparison condition

name: Collision
description: Detects collisions via an Area3D node located by name.\n\nType the node name (not the full path) into 'Area Node Name'.

name: Movement
description: Detects if the node is moving in specific directions.\nCheck which directions to monitor.\nActive when any checked direction moves past the threshold.

name: Physics
description: Checks CharacterBody3D collision state: on floor, on wall, or on ceiling.\nUse this for jump checks, wall checks, ceiling bumps, and platformer logic.

name: Proximity
description: Detects objects within a distance and optional angle.\nUses groups to filter which objects are detected.

name: Raycast
description: Detects along a RayCast3D. This can be used for objects, groups, walls, ground, or ledges.\nThe RayCast3D's direction, length, and collision mask are set on the RayCast3D node itself.

name: Always
description: Always logic brick.

name: Compare Variable
description: Compares a variable's value.\nWorks with local, exported, and global variables.\nAutomatically checks GlobalVars if not found locally.
props: Equal,Not Equal,Interval,Changed,Greater Than,Less Than,Greater or Equal,Less or Equal

name: Delay
description: Waits for Delay seconds, then stays active for Duration seconds.\nRepeat cycles the whole sequence.

name: Input Map
description: Detects input actions from Project > Input Map.\nSupports button presses, any-action checks, and analog joystick axis input.
props: Pressed,Just Pressed,Just Released,Any Pressed,Any Just Pressed,Any Just Released,Axis

name: Mouse
description: Detects mouse buttons, wheel, movement, and object hover

name: Random
description: Activates randomly each time it is evaluated.\\nPair with a Delay Sensor to control how often it rolls.\\nUseful for random behaviors, AI variation, and loot rolls.

name: Signal
description: Detects signals sent by a Signal Actuator.\nListens for a specific subject.

name: Always
description: Always active while enabled.

name: Button
description: Detects when a Button is pressed, toggled, hovered, or focused.

name: Delay
description: Triggers after a delay or at an interval.

name: Input Map
description: Detects Godot Input Map actions for UI logic.
props: Pressed,Just Pressed,Just Released,Any Pressed,Any Just Pressed,Any Just Released,Axis

name: Random
description: Randomly activates based on chance.

name: Signal
description: Receives a Logic Bricks message.

name: Variable
description: Compares a variable value.
props: Equal,Not Equal,Interval,Changed,Greater Than,Less Than,Greater or Equal,Less or Equal
